trigger_condition.note: Lower initial active equity percentage triggers more frequent reallocation

sizing_rule.note: Reallocation frequency of active-to-inactive equity should increase when starting with lower initial active equity percentage. Lower initial active % reduces drawdown risk on initial margin and prevents awkward equity ratios. Specific thresholds and reallocation intervals not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Reallocation of active to inactive equity should occur more frequently with lower initial active equity percentages to avoid awkward ratios and reduce drawdown risk on initial margin.
